likely_causes: Missing app ID in headers or parameters
next_checks: Check network inspector for headers
1001.suggested_fix: Ensure `appId` is sent in request headers for all API calls.

likely_causes: Token expired
Invalid token format
Re-using magic link
next_checks: Check network inspector payload for token value
7301.suggested_fix: Prompt the user to login again. Opaque tokens expire after 5 minutes.

likely_causes: Invalid client ID or secret
IP address not whitelisted
next_checks: Verify credentials in dashboard
7303.suggested_fix: Double-check your `clientId` and `clientSecret` against the OTPless dashboard.

likely_causes: Invalid signature on webhook payload
Incorrect webhook secret used
next_checks: Print raw body before parsing to verify no whitespace is lost
7305.suggested_fix: Compute HMAC-SHA256 of the exact raw body. Frameworks like Express or FastAPI might modify the body during parsing.

likely_causes: Too many OTP requests for this phone number / IP address
Rate limit configuration hit on dashboard
next_checks: Check rate limit configurations in customer dashboard
7020.suggested_fix: Wait for the timeout period (usually 1-5 minutes) or contact support to request limit adjustments.

likely_causes: User entered incorrect OTP multiple times in a row
Verification attempts rate limit hit
next_checks: Confirm verify attempts on server side
7021.suggested_fix: Initiate a new OTP flow. The current transaction is locked.

likely_causes: Session token has expired
Access token TTL reached
next_checks: Check exp claim in decrypted JWT or verify response details
7414.suggested_fix: Use the refresh token to request a new session token, or redirect user to login.

likely_causes: Session token was revoked manually
Session token signature validation failed
next_checks: Verify whether the session has been invalidated or if key rotation occurred
7415.suggested_fix: Clear client side storage (cookies/storage) and prompt the user to re-authenticate.

likely_causes: SDK failed to initialize
Invalid App ID or configuration
next_checks: Verify App ID is correct
Check that SDK dependency is installed correctly
5003.suggested_fix: Verify your App ID matches the dashboard. Ensure the SDK dependency version is correct and the app has internet permission.

likely_causes: Socket timeout exception
Slow or unstable network connection
next_checks: Check network connectivity
Verify no firewall is blocking OTPless endpoints
9100.suggested_fix: Check the device's network connection. Retry the request or show a network error indicator to the user.

likely_causes: Unknown host exception
DNS resolution failed for OTPless endpoints
next_checks: Verify internet permission in AndroidManifest.xml
Check DNS settings
9103.suggested_fix: Ensure <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> is in AndroidManifest.xml and the device has a working internet connection.

likely_causes: IOException during network request
Connection interrupted
next_checks: Check network stability
9104.suggested_fix: Retry the request. If persistent, verify network connectivity and proxy/VPN settings.

likely_causes: SDK initialization triggered before DOM is ready or component mounted
App ID is undefined at time of call
next_checks: Ensure your initialization logic runs inside useEffect or window.onload
7001.suggested_fix: Verify that your App ID is passed correctly and environment variables are loaded.

likely_causes: Bundle ID or Package Name mismatch with dashboard credentials configuration
next_checks: Check bundle identifier in Xcode or build.gradle against OTPless Developer Settings
7002.suggested_fix: Add your debug and production SHA-256 fingerprints/Bundle IDs to the Dev Settings page in your OTPless Dashboard.

likely_causes: Network connection offline on device
Firewall blocking carrier handshake endpoints
next_checks: Verify the device is connected to a cellular/WiFi network
7003.suggested_fix: Gracefully handle network error status by showing offline/retry UI indicator.

likely_causes: User cancelled the Google Credential Manager or Google Sign-In prompt
next_checks: Check SDK responseType and cancel flag
7004.suggested_fix: No action required, but you can restore the sign-in button state so the user can try again.

likely_causes: Google Play Services is outdated or missing on Android device
next_checks: Verify target device/emulator has Google Play Services installed
7005.suggested_fix: Advise the user to update Google Play Services, or hide Google Auth buttons if unavailable.

likely_causes: SNA failed and all smart auth fallback channels (WhatsApp/SMS) have failed or exhausted
next_checks: Check fallback delivery status on dashboard
9106.suggested_fix: SNA-only or Smart Auth flow has failed completely. Force manual phone/OTP verification fallback.

likely_causes: User backed out or clicked cancel on the WhatsApp redirect login interface
next_checks: Monitor callback trigger behavior in setResponseCallback
9107.suggested_fix: Let the user trigger WhatsApp login again, or offer alternative social sign-in methods.

likely_causes: SMS carrier gateway failure
Invalid phone number or regional block
next_checks: Verify regional configurations on OTPless SMS panel
9108.suggested_fix: Ensure the country code is prefixed correctly. If transient, ask the user to request a new code.

likely_causes: WhatsApp app is not installed on the user device
next_checks: Verify presence of WhatsApp package on device
9109.suggested_fix: Fallback to SMS OTP automatically by starting the phone verification flow.

likely_causes: Social OAuth provider login cancelled or connection reset
next_checks: Check social developer dashboard credentials
9110.suggested_fix: Restart OAuth flow or handle cancellations without crashing.

likely_causes: SNA verification could not be completed
Carrier verification failed for unspecified reason
next_checks: Retry the flow
Check if SNA is enabled for this carrier on OTPless dashboard
SP40003.suggested_fix: Trigger fallback authentication channel like WhatsApp/SMS. If persistent, contact OTPless support.

likely_causes: Country not supported for SNA verification
Verification is not available for the user's region yet
next_checks: Check user's country code against SNA-supported regions
SP40004.suggested_fix: SNA is not available in this country. Fall back to OTP/WhatsApp authentication for this user.

likely_causes: Phone number doesn't match the SIM or network
User entered a different number than the one on their active SIM
next_checks: Verify the user is using the correct phone number for their active SIM
SP40011.suggested_fix: The phone number doesn't match the SIM. Prompt the user to use the correct number or fall back to OTP.

likely_causes: Device could not establish a connection to the operator host URL
Cellular data connection unstable or unavailable
next_checks: Check device data connection and DNS resolution to operator endpoints
SP40021.suggested_fix: Verify mobile data is active. If persistent, fallback to OTP authentication.

likely_causes: Unspecified error while contacting the operator host URL
VPN or proxy interfering with carrier endpoint
IP address mismatch with carrier registration
next_checks: Check for active VPN or proxy interfaces
Verify mobile data route to carrier endpoint
SP40023.suggested_fix: Ask the user to disable VPN/proxy if active, or fallback to WhatsApp/SMS channel.

likely_causes: Verification failed with an unclassified error
Unknown error from carrier or OTPless system
next_checks: Check carrier platform status
Retry the verification
SP40025.suggested_fix: Fallback to WhatsApp or SMS OTP verification. If persistent, contact OTPless support.

likely_causes: Internal error on OTPless side
Something went wrong on OTPless servers
next_checks: Retry the request
Monitor OTPless status page
SP50001.suggested_fix: Retry the verification. If persistent, fallback to OTP/WhatsApp and contact OTPless support.

likely_causes: Missing clientId or clientSecret headers in the request
Client credentials not provided
next_checks: Verify clientId and clientSecret are included in request headers
70001.suggested_fix: Add clientId and clientSecret headers to your Telecom API request. Get these from the OTPless dashboard Dev Settings.

likely_causes: Invalid clientId or clientSecret
Credentials do not match any active application
next_checks: Verify credentials match the OTPless dashboard
70002.suggested_fix: Double-check your clientId and clientSecret against the OTPless dashboard Dev Settings page.

likely_causes: Invalid phone number format
Phone number is missing or malformed
next_checks: Verify phone number includes country code and is correctly formatted
P7102.suggested_fix: Ensure the phone number is valid and includes the correct country code.

likely_causes: Unable to retrieve operator details from the upstream provider
Telecom lookup failed
next_checks: Retry the request
Check if the operator is supported
P7301.suggested_fix: Retry the request. The upstream telecom provider may be temporarily unavailable.

likely_causes: SIM swap check is not supported for this phone number's operator
next_checks: Check operator support for SIM swap checks
P7311.suggested_fix: SIM swap check is not available for this operator. Consider alternative fraud detection methods.

likely_causes: SIM swap check could not be completed
Upstream provider failed to return SIM swap data
next_checks: Retry the request
P7314.suggested_fix: The SIM swap check failed. Retry or proceed with alternative verification.

likely_causes: Call forwarding check is not supported for this phone number's operator
next_checks: Check operator support for call forwarding checks
P7331.suggested_fix: Call forwarding check is not available for this operator.

likely_causes: Call forwarding check could not be completed
Upstream provider failed to return call forwarding status
next_checks: Retry the request
P7334.suggested_fix: The call forwarding check failed. Retry or proceed without this signal.
